meta.title: Bible avatar prompts (all individuals from 200 stories)
meta.note: Generated from assets/events with disciples/apostles/brothers expanded to individuals. All characters with mention_count >= 1 are emitted; is_active_default=true when mention_count >= 2, or when a character appears in an era_judges story at least once. Some codes have explicit visibility overrides, including abel=true, abijah_judah=true, absalom=true, achan=true, ahab=true, ahaz=true, ahaziah_israel=true, ahaziah_judah=true, amaziah_judah=true, amon_judah=true, asa=true, athaliah=true, baasha=true, cain=true, caleb=true, cornelius=true, elah_king=true, goliath=true, haggai=true, hoshea_king=true, jairus=true, jehoahaz_israel=true, jehoahaz_judah=true, jehoash_israel=true, jehoiachin=true, jehoiakim=true, jehoram_judah=true, jehoshaphat=true, jehu=true, jeroboam=true, jeroboam_ii=true, jesse=true, joash_judah=true, jonah=true, jonathan=true, joram_israel=true, josiah=true, jotham=true, korah=true, lydia=true, manasseh=true, matthias=true, menahem=true, micaiah=true, naaman=true, nadab=true, omri=true, pekah=true, pekahiah=true, phinehas=true, pilate=true, potiphar=true, rahab=true, rehoboam=true, shallum=true, stephen=true, uzziah=true, zechariah=true, zechariah_king=true, zechariah_prophet=true, zedekiah=true, zerubbabel=true, zimri=true, elizabeth=false, gabriel=false, god=false. Curated avatar roster entries may have mention_count=0 so avatars can be prepared before their story events are written. Runtime visibility is controlled by characters.is_active in DB. UI-only avatar entries are marked asset_only=true and are generated as PNG assets but skipped by DB seed builders.
